system:
You are a professional translator. Translate the user's text into clear, faithful English. Preserve technical terms, part numbers, SKUs, dates, and amounts verbatim. Return strict JSON: {"translated_text": str, "source_language": str, "notes": str|null}.

KEYSIGHT TRANSLATION KB — apply these rules:
  • Formatting: Reformat number grouping per locale (1.000,00 in DE/ES, 1,000.00 in EN). Do NOT convert currency unless explicitly requested.
  • Preserve verbatim: Keysight
  • Preserve verbatim: Keysight Technologies
  • Preserve verbatim: SOA
  • Preserve verbatim: PO
  • Preserve verbatim: Q2O
  • Preserve verbatim: SSD
  • Preserve verbatim: WO
  • Preserve verbatim: ECCN
  • Preserve verbatim: EAR99
  • Preserve verbatim: EAR
  • Preserve verbatim: ITAR
  • Preserve verbatim: A2LA
  • Preserve verbatim: ISO 17025
  • Preserve verbatim: Z540.3
  • Preserve verbatim: ANSI/NCSL
  • Preserve verbatim: MIL-STD-461
  • Preserve verbatim: MIL-STD-810
  • Preserve verbatim: AS9100
  • Preserve verbatim: IATF 16949
  • Preserve verbatim: ISO 26262
  • Preserve verbatim: BERT
  • Preserve verbatim: VNA
  • Preserve verbatim: DSO
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b(PO|Q|QT|QUOTE|SO|WO|INV|CCC|CC|CR)-[A-Z0-9-]+\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b[A-Z]\\d{4,5}[A-Z]?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b[A-Z]{2,4}\\d{2,4}[A-Z]?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\bN\\d{4}[A-Z]?(-\\d+[A-Z]?)?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\bM\\d{4}[A-Z]\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b(MXA|EXA|UXA|UXR|FieldFox|InfiniiVision|Truevolt|Trueform|Streamline)\\b
  • Tone: Use formal business register. Spanish: usted form. Japanese: keigo (敬語). German: Sie form. French: vous form.
user:
SOURCE_LANGUAGE_HINT: es
TEXT:
Estimado cliente:

Muchas gracias por contactar a Keysight SalesOps y por su interés en nuestro Plan de Mantenimiento Preventivo (PM) con calibración acreditada A2LA y nivel de servicio SLA Gold.

Hemos registrado su solicitud de cotización con los siguientes datos:

- Tipo de contrato: Plan de Mantenimiento Preventivo (PM)
- Calibración: acreditada A2LA
- Nivel de SLA solicitado: Gold
- Cantidad estimada de instrumentos: 8

Para poder preparar una propuesta precisa y ajustada a sus necesidades, agradeceríamos que nos confirme la siguiente información cuando le sea posible:

- Listado de los aproximadamente 8 instrumentos a incluir (modelo y número de serie, si está disponible)
- Duración deseada del contrato (por ejemplo, 12, 24 o 36 meses)
- Fecha preferida de inicio de la cobertura
- Ubicación de los equipos para la planificación logística

Una vez recibida esta información, nuestro equipo comercial elaborará la cotización formal del contrato de servicio y se la remitirá a la brevedad.

Quedamos atentos a su respuesta.

Un cordial saludo,
Keysight SalesOps

Return JSON only.
raw_response:
{"translated_text":"Dear Customer:

Thank you very much for contacting Keysight SalesOps and for your interest in our Preventive Maintenance Plan (PM) with A2LA-accredited calibration and Gold SLA service level.

We have registered your quotation request with the following details:

- Contract type: Preventive Maintenance Plan (PM)
- Calibration: A2LA-accredited
- Requested SLA level: Gold
- Estimated number of instruments: 8

In order to prepare an accurate proposal tailored to your needs, we would appreciate it if you could confirm the following information at your earliest convenience:

- List of the approximately 8 instruments to be included (model and serial number, if available)
- Desired contract duration (e.g., 12, 24, or 36 months)
- Preferred coverage start date
- Equipment location for logistics planning

Once we receive this information, our sales team will prepare the formal quotation for the service contract and send it to you as soon as possible.

We look forward to your reply.

Kind regards,
Keysight SalesOps","source_language":"es","notes":""}

parsed.translated_text:
Dear Customer:

Thank you very much for contacting Keysight SalesOps and for your interest in our Preventive Maintenance Plan (PM) with A2LA-accredited calibration and Gold SLA service level.

We have registered your quotation request with the following details:

- Contract type: Preventive Maintenance Plan (PM)
- Calibration: A2LA-accredited
- Requested SLA level: Gold
- Estimated number of instruments: 8

In order to prepare an accurate proposal tailored to your needs, we would appreciate it if you could confirm the following information at your earliest convenience:

- List of the approximately 8 instruments to be included (model and serial number, if available)
- Desired contract duration (e.g., 12, 24, or 36 months)
- Preferred coverage start date
- Equipment location for logistics planning

Once we receive this information, our sales team will prepare the formal quotation for the service contract and send it to you as soon as possible.

We look forward to your reply.

Kind regards,
Keysight SalesOps
